programme.desc: S1 , E351 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E311 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E513 : Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

programme.title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
programme.desc: S1 , E360 : Ajit Kumar, a killer on the run, hides in Banaras as Gopal, a missing tailor. He hopes to escape his past, but secrets unravel as old shadows start to creep in.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E311 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E513 : Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E446 : After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E583 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Janam Janamer Saathi
programme.desc: The lives of two lovers, Seema and Jeeban, change when Seema's father gets her married to someone else. However, when Seema's husband commits suicide, she goes to the village where she met Jeeban.

programme.title: Bhagya Debata
programme.desc: Jagadish Mondal, an honest commoner, fights against the unjust practices, corruption and crime prevalent in society in a bid to help the poor and needy, while also taking care of his family.

programme.title: Kalankini Badhu
programme.desc: Soumik leaves his family when his brothers are contemptuous about his inability to find a job. However, his continued absence begins to tear the family apart.

programme.title: Bourani
programme.desc: A manipulative woman schemes to control her brother's wealth by orchestrating a marriage, but her plans begin to unravel when unexpected love enters the picture.

programme.title: Ekai Eksho
programme.desc: Ratan, an honest autorickshaw driver, refuses to help a corrupt politician, Pradip Roy, which then leads to a local war. He also ends up falling in love with Jhilik, his daughter.

programme.title: Satarupa
programme.desc: Dr. Rupa unintentionally causes Shatadal's memory loss, leading him to see her as his only kin. Later, they fall for each other but when his past returns, he forgets her.

programme.title: 100 Percent Love
programme.desc: Competitive peers Balu and Mahalakshmi have ego clashes while in college. When they meet again after a few years, they try to outdo each other until they realise that they are in love.

programme.title: Kari Diye Kinlam
programme.desc: Sisters Lakshmi and Sati pursue independence but face recurring challenges in their individual journeys.

programme.title: Phire Pelam
programme.desc: Gautham falls in love with his friend Kannan's cousin, Sandhya. Problems arise when Gautham learns that his friend's parents want Kannan to marry Sandhya.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E585 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Break Ke Baad
programme.desc: Aaliya is not ready for commitment even after a decade-long friendship with Abhay. She remains indifferent when he follows her to Australia but is finally shaken when he announces his wedding.

programme.title: Half Girlfriend
programme.desc: After meeting in college, Madhav is smitten with Riya and falls in love with her. However, after his repeated attempts to win her over, she eventually agrees to become his half girlfriend.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mumbai Dobaara
programme.desc: Shoaib becomes the new mafia leader after killing his mentor, Sultan Mirza. He later finds a protégé in Aslam, but trouble ensues when they both fall in love with the same woman, Jasmine.

programme.title: Omkara
programme.desc: Ishwar dreams of becoming Omkara's successor after the latter wins the election. However, when Omkara appoints Keshav as his lieutenant, he feels betrayed and plots revenge.

programme.title: Jab We Met
programme.desc: Aditya, a heartbroken business tycoon, aimlessly boards a train to escape his depressing life. Soon, he meets Geet, a bubbly Punjabi girl, and gets pulled into her crazy life.

programme.title: Bheed
programme.desc: A policeman, a victim of bigotry, takes on the task of preventing migrants from crossing state borders during a major health crisis. However, tensions arise as the ground reality of prejudice emerges.

programme.title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
programme.desc: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Three handsome Sydney bachelors Aroush, Tanmay and Al - are having the time of their lives in Sydney. They flirt around, sleep around and have numerous 'gorgeous' conquests to their credit.

programme.title: 102 Not Out
programme.desc: Dattatraya Vakharia, a 102-year-old man with the heart of a child, lives with his 75-year-old son, Babulal. Full of energy, he aims to break the world record for the oldest man alive.

programme.title: Housefull 2
programme.desc: A comedy of errors wherein four men help each other to fool their prospective fathers-in-law creating a cascade of confusion and mayhem.

programme.title: Mantra
programme.desc: An Indian proprietor strives to sustain his enterprise against fierce global rivalry. Furthermore, he endeavours to compensate his family for lost time.

programme.title: Pippa
programme.desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.
